summary: Charity Impact Tracking feature fully tested. All 11 backend tests pass. Frontend ImpactSection component working correctly with all required elements: total contributed (15,00€), distributions count (1), events count (1), association breakdown, expandable detail with contribution list showing appointment title, date, amount, and status badge.

backend: GET /api/wallet/impact returns required fields (total_charity_cents, currency, distributions_count, events_count)
GET /api/wallet/impact returns by_association array with association_id, total_cents, count, name
GET /api/wallet/impact returns contributions array with distribution_id, amount_cents, status, appointment_title, currency, created_at
GET /api/wallet/impact totals are consistent (by_association sum = contributions sum = total_charity_cents)
GET /api/wallet/impact has charity data from demo distribution (1500c = 15 EUR)
frontend: Impact section appears when charity contributions exist (data-testid='impact-section')
Impact section shows total contributed amount (15,00 €)
Impact section shows association line with amount (Association charity_ = 15,00 €)
Impact detail toggle expands to show contributions by event
Contribution detail shows appointment title (Reunion strategie Q1)
Contribution detail shows status badge (en attente)
Impact section has gradient background (rose-50 to amber-50)

frontend_impact_section.design: Gradient background (rose-50 to amber-50), heart icon, rose color scheme
frontend_impact_section.stat_cards: 3 cards showing Total contribué, Distribution(s), Événement(s)
frontend_impact_section.association_breakdown: Shows association name (or ID if no name) with total amount
frontend_impact_section.expandable_detail: Toggle to show/hide contributions by event
frontend_impact_section.contribution_detail: Shows appointment title, date, amount, and status badge

seed_data_creation: None - used existing demo distribution (1 pending_hold with charity_demo beneficiary at 1500c)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Charity Impact Tracking feature fully implemented and tested. Key components: (1) GET /api/wallet/impact endpoint aggregates charity data from distribution ledger. (2) ImpactSection component in WalletPage shows total contributed, distributions count, events count. (3) By-association breakdown shows association_id with name (null if no named association in DB). (4) Expandable detail shows contributions by event with appointment title, date, amount, and status badge. (5) Section is hidden when total_charity_cents = 0. (6) Excludes cancelled distributions and refunded charity beneficiaries. Demo data: 1 pending_hold distribution with charity_demo beneficiary at 1500c (15 EUR). charity_associations collection is EMPTY (no named associations).
